description: Fragment of a deed of lease. The property is in Qaṣr al-Rūm (the Jewish quarter of Fusṭāṭ), in or related to Dār al-Qubba. A sum of 14 dinars is mentioned, possibly 2 paid ahead of time and the remaining 12 over the period of lease (10 months?). (Information in part from CUDL.)
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
